facts: Yazaki North America is a supplier of automotive wiring harnesses and related components.
Last month's total sea shipments for Yazaki North America were 327, representing a 4.22% decrease over one year.
The company imports under 161 names and 192 addresses.
Top imported product categories include electric motors, automotive iron/steel products, plastics, and other materials.
Asian import origins account for 74.8% of shipments, with the Philippines at 12,650, Vietnam at 8,799, Indonesia at 6,138, China at 5,811, and Japan at 3,470.
North American import origins account for 16.5% of shipments, with Nicaragua at 6,433, Mexico at 2,239, El Salvador at 345, Canada at 4, and Jamaica at 2.
Top HTS codes include 8544.30.12, 8544.30.10, 8544.30.19, 8544.30.14, and 8544.30.2090, all classified as ignition wiring sets and other wiring sets used in vehicles, aircraft, or ships.

Other HTS codes pulled from product descriptions include 8536.90.11 (other apparatus), 3926.90.8536 (fasteners/clips for mechanical attaching devices), 8544.49.19, 3926.90.10 (buckets and pails), and 3926.90.40 (imitation gemstones).
Product descriptions frequently reference "Automotive Wiring Harness For Original Production Assembly" shipped in cartons, slip sheets, or pallets.
Recent shipments dated June 25-28, 2026, include raw auto parts, electric wires, shield shells, and automotive wiring harnesses originating from Asia to the US Pacific route.
Estimated freight costs for recent Asia-to-US Pacific shipments range from approximately $1,611.50 to $6,843.36 per shipment, with rates provided by Xeneta based on estimated booking.
One invoice references an address at 6700 Haggerty Road, Canton, Michigan 48187 U.S.A.
Another contact address listed is 2820 B Street NW 101, Auburn, WA 98001.
Yazaki North America imports raw materials for auto parts including covers, fuse bracket assemblies, terminals, rubber stoppers, and copper wire.
The company also imports production equipment such as unit crimping machine hopper devices.
Shipment weights for recent automotive wiring harness orders range from 251 kg to 26,428 kg per container or pallet load.
Quantities shipped per order vary widely, from 16 pieces to over 1,045 cartons or boxes.
The page notes that Yazaki North America's suppliers require premium access.
Freight cost data is based on total estimated freight cost per shipment on supported shipping routes.
